name: PowerShell Execution
description: Detects PowerShell execution including script block logging (captures obfuscated/encoded scripts), module logging, and engine lifecycle events. Event 4104 is the most critical — captures full script content even when encoded.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

event_descriptions.400: Engine state changed to Running — contains HostApplication (calling process)
event_descriptions.600: Provider lifecycle — can detect AMSI bypass providers loaded
event_descriptions.4103: Module logging — pipeline execution details with full output
event_descriptions.4104: Script block logging — FULL script content captured (critical: catches Base64/obfuscated)
